name: Deal Workspace

shells.sidebar-main: Left navigation sidebar with deal list and main content area for workspace views

description: Private equity deal workspace with dashboard, stage gate tracking, and per-stage detail views. Core interface for managing active M&A and investment transactions through structured stage progression.

page_briefs.overview: Deal dashboard opens with a KPI grid showing deal value, IRR projection, close probability, and days to target close. Below, a horizontal stage-gates ribbon displays the full deal lifecycle with the current stage highlighted and completed gates checked. An activity feed on the right streams recent document uploads, Q&A posts, and investor actions with timestamps.
page_briefs.stage-detail: Stage detail view shows the vertical stage-gates rail on the left indicating context within the overall deal lifecycle. The main area presents a form-sections layout containing this stage's required deliverables, checklists, approvals, and sign-off fields. Stage owner, due date, and blocking dependencies surface at the top.
